name: BMW G14/G15/G16 8 Series (4.4L V8 twin-turbo petrol)

serviceNotes.engine oil: Hot-vee twin-turbo V8; CBS often ~15,000 km / 12 months—many owners use 10,000 km.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 30,000 km: two air filters each second engine oil service (2 × 15,000 km V8 ceiling), aligned with F10 N63 / garage.wiki F10 second-oil rule.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Changed from 60,000 km to 45,000 km: eight plugs each third engine oil service (3 × 15,000 km), parallel BMW-F10-N63 N63 CBS pattern.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection V8: carbon service ~120,000 km if needed.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 15,000 km / 12 months EU maximum (large turbo V8). https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html (G14 M850i N63 aligned with F10 N63 CBS)
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change; BMW owner's manual G14 M850i
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — brake fluid table; BMW owner's manual G14 M850i
serviceSources.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 30,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — second engine oil change (2 × 15,000 km V8 ceiling)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 60,000 km to 45,000 km — third oil × 15,000 km ceiling; parallel BMW-F10-N63 / BMW TIS N63 maintenance data
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 40,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 50,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
